title: Mizoram PSC Assistant Controller of Mines Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Assistant Controller of Mines Notification 2026 has been released on 4 May 2026 on the official website of Mizoram PSC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Assistant Controller of Mines Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates (or as notified by the Government from time to time).

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc. degree in Mining Engineering
qualification.details: B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc. degree in Mining Engineering from a recognized University. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency (qualifying test or exemption as per rules).

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
